title: VIII. APPENDIX
section_name: 8.1 Brief explanation of the organization of this section
summary: Appendix overview page explaining how the back-of-book appendix is organized, including chronological lists, reaction-category tables, and functional-group lookup tables intended for rapid navigation of named reactions.
family_names: Appendix|Chronological Reaction Index|Reaction Categories|Affected Functional Groups|Preparation of Functional Groups
notes: Meta-navigation page for the appendix section rather than a single reaction family.

title: LIST OF NAMED REACTIONS IN CHRONOLOGICAL ORDER OF THEIR DISCOVERY
summary: Chronological appendix table page listing named reactions by year of discovery together with the corresponding textbook page numbers, serving as a historical lookup index.
notes: Historical appendix index page; useful for locating named reactions by discovery year.
